film.title: Oh Darling! Yeh Hai India!
film.overview: Miss India and an aspiring actor spend a night together roaming the streets of Mumbai and unwittingly clash paths with a megalomaniacal gangster planning to take over India.

dialogues.dialogue: Amazing brains... Don Kihote has! Get in! Go on! Shame on those who suppress laughter! Shame on those who are against our Joys! Shame! Shame!
Get in! Go on! Shame on those who suppress laughter! Shame on those who are against our Joys! Shame! Shame! - Who's that? This is Don Kihote.
Shame on those who suppress laughter! Shame on those who are against our Joys! Shame! Shame! - Who's that? This is Don Kihote. There's a girl there. In a red dress.
Amazing brains... Don Kihote has! Get in! Go on! Shame on those who suppress laughter! Shame on those who are against our Joys! Shame! Shame!
dialogues.target_person: people who suppress laughter and joy
